comment.body:
I was wondering when cavalry would arrive to attack the left flank. Always on time 0Mik.
So her writing last Thursday about a JPM collar trade that was due to expire in 2.5 weeks by potentially dragging price down in a spot down/vol down environment towards 4700 is intraday vol noise? She even said at the end of the post “when they close the collar at the end of March, and it is ITM, the buyback flow induces supportive flow without an elevated spot/vol beta.” But that statement just applies to intraday vol noise last Thursday right? Sssuuurrreee. It may have been in the “intraday post” but just because it is doesn’t mean she wasn’t giving analysis that had implications on a larger time frame

I’m dropping quotes from the actual post this entire time. Are you actually being honest about differentiating what she’s writing herself? Doesn’t seem like it. And I find it humorous that the most snarky, defensive person in this group is telling me to stop being snarky.

But ya, I guess what you’re saying is she was potentially expecting the market to drop 400-800 points towards 4700 on just last Thursday alone. Got it. My mistake. I need to read the data better and stop over complicating things.

She also kept saying “I’m shorting vol without any directional take” only to take plenty of trades on Thursday with a long directional take in expectations of a rally, while also shorting vol. But again, this doesn’t make sense as the price was trading below the 5565 collar, where spot should have decayed with vol according to her analysis. So she actually took trades that went against her spot decay analysis and her vol decay analysis. As she said spot up, vol up. Give me the quotes she said from last Thursday where she said otherwise. You can’t. All you can to is make generalized attacks saying I’m not being nuanced when I’m being EXTREMELY NUANCED with quotes and references to later price action.

This is getting a bit ridiculous.

comment.body: the real time flows have to be considered too! The OD profiles are EOD…. I dont think the input of the educational posts Chats and daily pre market analysis are enough to have a gameplan on! So its more of a general tool to help you add to your own edge! And observe how those flows work and get a feel for it! Which probably takes a few years
